Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Develpoment, is present. Represented by Abdula Doh.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Grace Lawrence, is present.
Attorney, Laura Chiera, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-10-2010 is vacated.
